subject: [For Review] Jan CB Quarterly Management Meeting

content.answer:
Hi Ian/JH,

Please find attached deck for the upcoming CB Quarterly meeting with CF on
27th Jan for your review. The content is mostly similar to Monthly meeting
with TP, with some updates as below:

*Slide 28-41:* [CN Seller Update] CN Seller Performance Review, Topline
Projection and 2025 CN Seller Initiatives/Plan
*Slide 95:* [KR SLS] Updated cost per order target for 2025

Let me know if any questions, will send deck to Chris on 26th Jan.

-- 
*Jason YU*
*Regional CB*
*Mobile*: +65 90284825
*Email*: jason.yu@shopee.com

content.question:
For Taobao direct, will we be able to share updated numbers on top of just
SG/MY?

content.answer:
The sequence of SLS part is quite strange. We complete SLS full year plan
first, then talk about BR commercial CC.

The rest are fine. Thanks!

Hi Ian/JH,

Ian: For Taobao direct, will we be able to share updated numbers on top of
just SG/MY?
Have added new slide 87 on TB Direct performance for other lanes,
screenshot below:
[image: image.png]

JH: The sequence of SLS part is quite strange. We complete SLS full year
plan first, then talk about BR commercial CC.
Slide 106-107: Have changed the sequence of presentation; BR commercial CC
shifted to after 2025 plan


On Sun, Jan 26, 2025 at 8:20 AM Jianghong Liu <jianghong.liu@shopee.com>
wrote:


-- 
*Jason YU*
*Regional CB*
*Mobile*: +65 90284825

Hi Ian,

How about pc2? Was growth prm driven?

   - SG: MTD PC2 positive at $576 (6.45%) daily
   - MY: MTD PC2 positive at $874 (2.00%) daily
   - Other markets: to start tracking PC2 from 1 Feb; the current growth is
   likely driven by both marketing push + VN platform's pre-CNY traffic
   growth. Will detail out the PC2 drivers in the tracking.

Thank you.
Cuiwei
